title: Radio Paradise on Chumby
summary: I created the Official Radio Paradise widget for Chumby, the internet connected hacky sack! You can listen along, see the most recently played songs, and the current playing song with album artwork. Fun fact: this was my one and only contract involving Flash Lite. A Really Low Quality Screenshot of the Chumby Web Management Interface Links www.theregister.c…
content:
I created the Official Radio Paradise widget for Chumby, the internet connected hacky sack! You can listen along, see the most recently played songs, and the current playing song with album artwork.

Fun fact: this was my one and only contract involving Flash Lite.

A Really Low Quality Screenshot of the Chumby Web Management Interface
